commands.review_summary:
The branch changes Windows doctor/update service repair to restart a running managed gateway after a successful git update, detect stale service-version metadata, and remove Startup-folder fallback launchers only after Scheduled Task running evidence.

PR surface: Source +91, Tests +246. Total +337 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence repro was run in this review. The linked issue has concrete native Windows logs, and current main shows doctor's git-update path returns after update without restarting the service while update-mode service repair stages instead of installs, making the failure source-reproducible.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Draft/protected maintainer PR should stay in human review pending native elevated Windows and WSL upgrade proof; no narrow automated repair was identified.

target.title: fix(windows): repair doctor update fallback migration
target.body:
Summary:
- fixes the Windows doctor git-update path so a successful update restarts the running managed gateway instead of leaving the stale process on old dist chunks
- teaches doctor service repair to detect stale `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_VERSION` metadata and only activate/migrate Windows services during update repair when the gateway was already running
- cleans up old Startup-folder fallback launchers only after Task Scheduler itself reports the Scheduled Task is running

Fixes #87156.

Verification:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/daemon/schtasks.stop.test.ts src/daemon/schtasks.startup-fallback.test.ts src/commands/doctor-update.test.ts src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.test.ts src/cli/update-cli/update-command.test.ts src/cli/update-cli/restart-helper.test.ts` passed: 134 focused tests across 3 shards
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/daemon/schtasks.stop.test.ts` passed after the final test expectation amendment
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/daemon/schtasks.stop.test.ts` passed after the final test expectation amendment
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD` passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean before the final expectation-only amendment
- Windows probe: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26682929818 succeeded on native Windows (`Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.26100.0`, `cmd` version `10.0.26100.4946`, x64, PowerShell 7.4.11, Git 2.51.0.windows.1)
- Manual CI: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26682929823 is still in progress; `checks-windows-node-test` passed, many node/check lanes passed, `build-artifacts` failed on unrelated `scripts/test-projects.test.ts` changed-target routing drift, and `checks-node-agentic-command-support` hit a daemon Vitest no-output timeout after the touched schtasks/service-audit daemon tests passed

Real behavior proof:
- Behavior addressed: native Windows doctor/update repair no longer leaves a running Startup-folder fallback gateway on stale dist chunks, and migration cleanup avoids duplicate startup launchers.
- Real environment tested: focused mocked Windows service lifecycle tests locally; native Windows runner probe confirmed the target branch and host runtime surface.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: the commands and Actions runs listed in Verification above.
- Evidence after fix: unit coverage now proves running Windows update repairs use the activating install path, stopped Windows update repairs stay staged, successful Scheduled Task activation/restart removes the Startup-folder launcher only when Task Scheduler reports the task running, and ambiguous old-listener evidence preserves the fallback. Native Windows CI probe reached the target branch on a Windows runner.
- Observed result after fix: focused Vitest shards, targeted oxlint, oxfmt check, diff check, autoreview, and native Windows probe passed. Manual CI is not fully green yet for the reasons above.
- What was not tested: real elevated native Windows doctor/update migration, and a real WSL distro path. The WSL probe found `wsl.exe` and set WSL default version 2, but the runner required a HypervisorPlatform reboot (`enable_feature_HypervisorPlatform_exit=3010`), did not expose `Microsoft-Hyper-V-All`, had no installed distros, and Ubuntu import/exec exited `-1` with `wsl2_ok=false`.
target.author: vincentkoc
